news.t: T. ROWE PRICE EXPANDS FIXED INCOME OFFERINGS WITH FOUR NEW ACTIVE ETFS

overview.description: The T. Rowe Price High Income Municipal ETF (THYM) is an exchange-traded fund. The ETF currently has 25.36m in AUM and 209 holdings. THYM invests primarily in longer-term, low- to upper-medium quality municipal bonds THYM was launched on Nov 19, 2025 and is issued by T. Rowe Price.

data.title: T. ROWE PRICE EXPANDS FIXED INCOME OFFERINGS WITH FOUR NEW ACTIVE ETFS
data.text: BALTIMORE, Nov. 20, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- T. Rowe Price (NASDAQ-GS: TROW), a global investment management firm and leader in retirement, announced today the addition of four new active fixed income exc...
